title: Horse Upgrades
description: Upgrades Horses, Animals, Tack And More In The Furture Side Note This Is Alpha By The Way
body:
Upgrades Horses With The Mod Star Worm Equestrian!

It Also Adds More Such As:
Better Dogs.
More Food.
Genetic Animals.
And More! Anyways That's All I'm Gonna Say For What The ModPack Has, More Updates Soon!
You Can Ride SWEM Horses Using A Saddle And More Ridiculously Expensive To Get Tack, You Can Get Dog Talents Aswell As More Skins Using A 'Training Treat', With The Mod Farmers Delight We Made It Possible To Craft More Food's Other Than The Normal Vanilla Foods. The Create Mod Adds Alot Aswell, We Now Have Made It So You Can Mine Trees And Ores In 1 Stroke! Skin Layers Are 3D Now Too. Even In Peacful Mode You Still Have To Eat! 

Note: Peaceful Depletion May Be Removed In The Future

Note 2: Sorry For Any Bugs I Will Be Fixing Them In The Future

Thats All<3
